message:
fix(engine): add length prefixes to semantic contract hash fields and fix division-by-zero in dark matter summary

Add length-prefix encoding for ordering_constraints, capability_requirements,
and their string elements in HookSemanticContract and EffectSemanticContract
to prevent hash collisions from concatenated variable-length fields.

Replace if/else division with checked_div().unwrap_or(0) in dark matter
engine summary to prevent division-by-zero panic. Remove unused imports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
